title: Country Delight Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Country Delight Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Country Delight Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Country Delight Ventures Solutions:
Country Delight Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Country Delight Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
